name: DEFECT/DAMAGED PACKAGE CLEARANCE: Bonnie Adult Dog Food - Lamb and Rice 15kg
shortDescription: Expertly formulated by canine nutritionists, Bonnie Lamb & Rice Adult Dog Food delivers a complete, nutrient-rich diet tailored for adult dogs. The combination of high-quality lamb protein and rice provides optimal energy, supports digestive health, and promotes a shiny coat.
description: Bonnie Lamb & Rice Adult Dog food , full-balanced, lamb protein-containing all natural dog food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. Lamb meal has been used as animal protein source. The balance of omega 3 & 6 is provided by using flaxseed . Yucca plant provides ammonia and odour control, increase absorption of nutrients, strengthens the immune system and optimises animal growth and performance. A good intestinal health and performance is provided by CitriStim which is a source of pathogen-binding mannooligosaccharide , immune provide beta-glucans and immune-supportive yeast. Healthy skin and shiny coat is supported by using brewer's yeast . Muscles, organs and nerve cells are supported, and the immune system strengthened by using whey powder . Rich vitamin contents. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein.......................... 21% Fat .............................11% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) .........4% INGREDIENTS: Lamb Proteins (dehydrated), Animal proteins (dehydrated), Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Corn Gluten, Rice, Dried Beet Pulp, Liver Flavour, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer's Yeast, Yucca Schidigera, Mannan-Oligosaccharides, Beta Glucan. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Ionide, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.
